nodes.name: Bradypterus
nodes.summary: Bradypterus（Bradypterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Knysna warbler、Bangwa forest warbler、Barratt's warbler等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-winged swamp warbler
nodes.summary: The white-winged swamp warbler (Bradypterus carpalis), also known as the white-winged scrub-warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is found in Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia. Its natural habitat is swamps. References
